name: elitemotors
description: EliteMotors monorepo — car dealership & rental platform

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "SERVER,CLIENT" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
